text: 1. Apprentices or trainees. The  first  payroll  on  which  any  apprentice  or  trainee appearsmustbeaccompaniedbyacopyofthatapprentice'sortrainee'sregistration in a registered or approved program. A copy of the portions of the registered or approved program pertaining to the wage rates and ratios shall also accompany the first payroll on which the first apprentice or trainee appears.
